zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Margaret Beeston於1503年9月12日出生在英國爾貝斯頓時，她的父親John Beeston25歲，母親Katherine Calveley31歲。她於1518年與Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1584年10月22日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年81歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Margaret Beeston于1503年9月12日出生在英国爾貝斯頓时，她的父亲John Beeston25岁，母亲Katherine Calveley31岁。她于1518年与Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1584年10月22日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年81岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Beeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the many places in England so called. Those in Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire were settlements where bent grass grew (Old English bēos ‘rough grass’ + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’). In Bedfordshire it probably denoted a settlement on a bend (Old English byge + genitive singular -es + tūn). The hamlet stands on a marked bend of the river Yvel. In Cheshire it is named from a rock, below which trading took place (Old English byge ‘commerce’ + Old English stān ‘stone’). The reference is to a prominent crag where the remains of Beeston Castle stand. Compare Beaston and Beeson .
occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived in that part of a village known in Middle English as bi este toun ‘(place) at the east (end) of the village’.

variants.name: Beston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   and   Beaston  .

variants.name: Beeson
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston  , a habitational name from a place called Beeston. The spelling reflects the local pronunciation of the Nottinghamshire placename, although this form is now quite widespread in England.

variants.name: Beaston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   (the more common form of the surname in England), a habitational name from any of various places called Beeston.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Margaret Beeston was born on 12 September 1503, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, her father, John Beeston, was 25 and her mother, Katherine Calveley, was 31. She married Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire in 1518, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 22 October 1584, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Margaret Beeston est née le 12 septembre 1503, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Beeston, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Calveley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire en 1518, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1584, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Margaret Beeston am 12. September 1503 in Beeston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Beeston 25 und ihre Mutter Katherine Calveley 31. Sie hat 1518 in England, United Kingdom Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1584 im Alter von 81 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Margaret Beeston è nata il il 12 settembre 1503 nel Beeston, Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Beeston, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Katherine Calveley, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire nel 1518, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 22 ottobre 1584, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Margaret Beestonが1503年9月12日にイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで生まれた時，父John Beestonは25歳，母Katherine Calveleyは31歳であった。1518年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Wyche of Davenham, Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1584年10月22日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで81歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Margaret Beeston(이)가 1503년 9월 12일 영국 체실르 브이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Beeston(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Calveley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 10월 22일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.12 September 1503–22 October 1584: 12 de setembro de 1503–22 de outubro de 1584
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Margaret Beeston nasceu em 12 de setembro de 1503, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Beeston, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Calveley, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire em 1518, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1584, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Margaret Beeston родилась 12 сентября 1503 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Beeston было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Calveley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire в 1518 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 22 октября 1584 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.12 September 1503–22 October 1584: 12 de septiembre de 1503–22 de octubre de 1584
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Margaret Beeston nació el 12 de septiembre de 1503, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Beeston, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Katherine Calveley, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard Wyche of Davenham, Esquire en 1518, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1584, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
